purpose: Classify Project Telos, Build ecosystem, research, proof-demo, publication, and source-intake artifacts without turning source leads into unsupported public claims.

evidence.notes: Manifest exposes source-checkout profiles for gather, index, forum, crucible, and telos.
Working tree contains edited current-state docs plus untracked QEC and outreach artifacts. Treat those as working-tree evidence until committed.
Closed-shape federation registry validated five requested videos and one Ti Morse channel catalog as source leads.
Path/count scan only. It classifies public documentation surfaces and does not prove content correctness or publication readiness.
Build subregistry separates BuildLang/buildc receipt claims, Build Universe alpha module reality, Build app proof lanes, and editor-support-only packages.
Proof/witnessing subregistry separates witness, validator, index, report, and publication-theory layers.
Senses subregistry separates research/philosophy substrate, dissertation apparatus, paper-track kits, citation gates, and referenced-missing curation artifacts.
Telos repo subregistry separates front-door, control-plane, research, proof-demo, outreach, receipt, integration, and quarantine surfaces without treating working-tree artifacts as shipped.

labels.public-index: Stable navigation, product positioning, current state, and repo-level facts.
labels.public-official: Short public-safe claim summary with receipts, non-claims, and promotion gates.
labels.public-whitepaper: Longer methods or strategy paper that still requires publication review.
labels.proof-demo: Runnable fixture, test, receipt, or site page that demonstrates a bounded claim.
labels.paper-candidate: Artifact family that can become a formal paper after citation, method, artifact, and risk review.
labels.internal-source: Raw transcripts, private scans, runbooks, sensitive paths, private payloads, or high-risk operational detail.
labels.quarantine-and-adapt: Valuable but stale, overclaimed, unsafe, duplicated, or not yet verified.
labels.deprecated-lineage: Historical name or repo preserved for lineage only.

documentation_rows.audience: operators, release reviewers, paper editors, proof-demo builders, and outreach reviewers
documentation_rows.current_action: Use as the source of truth for Telos repo surface boundaries, working-tree gates, and publication routing.
documentation_rows.claim_boundary: Repo surface classification only; not release certification, site-live proof, scientific proof, market proof, or commit/push proof.

documentation_rows.audience: operators, Build ecosystem maintainers, and paper/demo planners
documentation_rows.current_action: Use as the Build ecosystem source of truth for maturity, receipt, Telos integration, and publication boundaries.
documentation_rows.claim_boundary: Documentation-backed classification only; not a benchmark, release certification, or market claim.

documentation_rows.audience: operators, proof-demo builders, and publication reviewers
documentation_rows.current_action: Use as the proof/witnessing source of truth for layer boundaries, Telos bridges, and publication controls.
documentation_rows.claim_boundary: Documentation-backed classification only; not a release approval, compliance finding, safety decision, or proof that every repo has current passing CI.

documentation_rows.audience: operators, paper editors, publication reviewers, and theory-to-tool integrators
documentation_rows.current_action: Use as the source of truth for Senses corpus boundaries, paper gates, human-ownership gates, and missing-artifact caveats.
documentation_rows.claim_boundary: Research/philosophy corpus classification only; not philosophical proof, journal readiness, authorship attestation, citation verification, or Telos product capability.

documentation_rows.current_action: Use as the cross-repo doc-surface map before deeper per-repo subregistries.
documentation_rows.claim_boundary: Path/count scan only; labels are triage hints and do not prove document freshness or safety.

documentation_rows.current_action: Keep as the front door; link control-plane docs without turning it into a strategy dump.
documentation_rows.claim_boundary: Only stable project-level claims and current public demos.

documentation_rows.current_action: Keep factual; record docs, proof-demo, and receipt additions.
documentation_rows.claim_boundary: Ledger of changed artifacts, not market or scientific proof.

documentation_rows.current_action: Refresh after every serious Index, Forum, Gather, Crucible, and Telos pass.
documentation_rows.claim_boundary: Live state packet; distinguish committed, working-tree, planned, and inferred.

documentation_rows.current_action: Use as the north-star map for megatool integration and domain lab sequencing.
documentation_rows.claim_boundary: Strategic hypotheses and first proof lanes, not proof of domain outcomes.

documentation_rows.current_action: Maintain as the human-readable companion to this JSON registry.
documentation_rows.claim_boundary: Classification rules, not scientific or market claims.

documentation_rows.current_action: Use as the risk and scope rulebook for frontier-domain work.
documentation_rows.claim_boundary: Allows broad research scope while fencing high-risk technical payloads.

documentation_rows.current_action: Refresh Build naming, megatool joins, and the larger industrial-science lanes.
documentation_rows.claim_boundary: Topology map; not a maturity claim for each repo.

documentation_rows.current_action: Refresh from the 2026-07-02 Index counts before treating as current.
documentation_rows.claim_boundary: Inventory must not overclaim private/local-only work.

documentation_rows.current_action: Update after the market-research scorecard rather than guessing personas.
documentation_rows.claim_boundary: Buyer fit must remain hypothesis-labeled until backed by market evidence.

research_packet_rows.status_summary: BuildLang/buildc documentation describes C-backend execution, typed effects, receipt export, invariant families, negative fixtures, and Crucible export.
next_actions: Create a Telos-side Build receipt import fixture.
Export one BuildLang scientific runtime receipt into a Crucible registry.
Add a methods paper draft with non-claims around language maturity.
research_packet_rows.risk_boundary: Do not claim Julia replacement or production-grade reliability without benchmark and adoption evidence.

research_packet_rows.status_summary: Toy-DAG fixture emits CAUSAL_DAG_FIXTURE_MATCH and keeps real discovery, biomedical, and BuildLang-native claims out of scope.
next_actions: Add synthetic SCM with known treatment effect.
Add estimator receipts and negative-control fixtures.
Port the typed DAG spec to BuildLang/buildc.
research_packet_rows.risk_boundary: No clinical, biomedical, or general causal-discovery claims.

research_packet_rows.status_summary: Differential-drive fixture emits EMBODIED_SIM2REAL_FIXTURE_MATCH with unit, latency, trace, safety-envelope, and negative-control checks.
next_actions: Add BuildLang typed-unit replay.
Add manipulation fixture with pose, contact state, and action budget.
Add a safety-stop non-claim gate.
research_packet_rows.risk_boundary: No real-world robot safety, surgical, medical, or autonomy guarantee claims.

research_packet_rows.status_summary: Source packet is receipt-backed; biological cognition and universal-routing claims remain unverifiable.
next_actions: Frame as a hyphal context protocol, not biology truth.
Add answer-quality measurement across corpora.
Add false-claim and lost-evidence rate measurements.
research_packet_rows.risk_boundary: No claims about biological cognition or universal network intelligence.

research_packet_rows.status_summary: One deterministic fixture reports about 98.92 percent token savings with zero recorded answer deltas for the fixture, but model answer quality is not broadly measured.
next_actions: Run over multiple corpora.
Measure answer quality, false positives, missing evidence, and evaluator agreement.
Add BuildLang receipt shape for context selection.

research_packet_rows.status_summary: Finite Lean/operator preflight is bounded; parent PDE or Navier-Stokes claims remain unverifiable.
next_actions: Add smooth-periodic theorem boundary.
Add BuildLang relation-invariant numerical receipt.
Add formal/numerical boundary table.
research_packet_rows.risk_boundary: No grand-problem or continuum theorem claims.

research_packet_rows.status_summary: Working-tree 3-qubit bit-flip stabilizer fixture emits QEC_STABILIZER_FIXTURE_MATCH; larger QEC, hardware, fault-tolerance, and BuildLang-native claims are not replayed.
next_actions: Commit or explicitly mark as working-tree-only before external publication.
Add BuildLang typed Pauli/stabilizer runtime.
Add surface-code syndrome fixture and Clifford equivalence checker.
research_packet_rows.risk_boundary: No hardware QEC, quantum advantage, fault tolerance, cryptographic, or resource-estimation claims.

research_packet_rows.status_summary: Five requested videos and a Ti Morse channel catalog were captured as metadata/transcript/source-lead receipts; inferred lanes include nuclear manufacturing, causal DAGs, ARC-style AGI evaluation, microscopy/materials/biology, AI scale economics, manufacturing, energy, drones, uranium, space infrastructure, biotech, and supersonics.
next_actions: Promote one lane at a time using primary sources.
Create industrial-science packet schema with units, regulation state, safety boundary, and uncertainty.
Create BuildLang replay for one low-risk calculation before any stronger field claim.
research_packet_rows.risk_boundary: No nuclear safety, throughput, licensing, weapons, enrichment, industrial performance, medical, or AGI superiority claims from videos alone.

build_ecosystem_rows.integration_need: Use this subregistry before making BuildLang/buildc, Build Universe, color/calibration, quant/forecasting, or editor-support claims.

build_ecosystem_rows.market_role: accountable scientific language and runtime layer
build_ecosystem_rows.integration_need: Telos should consume BuildLang/buildc receipt exports as first-class measurement packets.

build_ecosystem_rows.market_role: Build family map and self-hosting direction
build_ecosystem_rows.integration_need: Use for naming, language/runtime reality, and BuildOS boundary.

build_ecosystem_rows.market_role: color, rendering, profile, and calibration proof kit
build_ecosystem_rows.integration_need: Join display calibration state, ACES/OCIO-style transforms, delta-E checks, profile hashes, and Build receipts.

build_ecosystem_rows.market_role: display calibration and measured output layer
build_ecosystem_rows.integration_need: Pair with Telos display calibration and color proof packets.
Keep backtest and strategy claims receipt-bound with no investment advice.

proof_witnessing_rows.market_role: authoritative proof/witnessing planning registry for this consolidation pass
proof_witnessing_rows.integration_need: Use this subregistry before making EMET, Proof Surface, Repo Proof Index, Proof Surface Report, or Witnessing Spine claims.

proof_witnessing_rows.market_role: external witness and byte/source-view integrity layer
proof_witnessing_rows.integration_need: Map EMET witness receipts into Telos source/view consistency, report integrity, and release-readiness packets without trust or approval language.

proof_witnessing_rows.market_role: portable proof-packet contract and domain wedge validator layer
proof_witnessing_rows.integration_need: Bridge Telos agent-action, research-claim, ai4science, visual-measurement, and conservation packets into Proof Surface validators.
Run over selected Telos proof artifacts to expose proof packets, witness receipts, backend descriptors, and evidence gaps before publication.
Render selected Telos proof packets and witness receipts into public-safe handoff reports after the packet is registry-labeled and verified.

proof_witnessing_rows.market_role: publication and theory corpus for external witnessing
proof_witnessing_rows.integration_need: Use as theory and market-context reference while keeping it separate from shipped Telos product capability claims.

senses_and_sensibility_rows.market_role: authoritative research/philosophy corpus planning registry for this consolidation pass
senses_and_sensibility_rows.integration_need: Use this subregistry before making Senses, Conferred Existence, dissertation, paper-track, or human-gate claims.

senses_and_sensibility_rows.market_role: research corpus front door and theory-positioning layer
senses_and_sensibility_rows.integration_need: Link as theory context only; keep pre-proof, live-scholarship, and human-gate boundaries visible.

senses_and_sensibility_rows.market_role: integrated accountability and conferral thesis substrate
senses_and_sensibility_rows.integration_need: Use summarized concepts for Telos rationale, not direct product claims or final dissertation claims.

senses_and_sensibility_rows.market_role: viva, contribution, and adversarial review apparatus
senses_and_sensibility_rows.integration_need: Import human-ownership, provenance-ledger, and non-claim gates into the Telos publication queue.
Keep as paper candidates blocked on human re-derivation, live venue checks, citation verification, anonymization, and AI-use disclosure.

senses_and_sensibility_rows.market_role: citation integrity policy and reference ledger
senses_and_sensibility_rows.integration_need: Adopt the no-unverified-locator rule in Telos papers, whitepapers, and proof packets.

senses_and_sensibility_rows.market_role: preserved source substrate and discussion lineage
senses_and_sensibility_rows.integration_need: Reference by path, digest, and summarized boundary only; do not copy long source bodies into Telos front-door docs.
Use as conceptual rationale for Telos receipts, gates, and authn/authz separation; require separate tests for implementation claims.
Restore, regenerate, or patch references to CURATION.md, CONSOLIDATION.md, CROSS-MODEL-AUDIT.md, HUMAN-GATE-RUNBOOK.md, submission/SHIPPING-MANIFEST.md, and SPRINT.md before publication cleanup.

telos_repo_rows.role: public repository front door and release ledger
telos_repo_rows.market_role: external discoverability and stable demo navigation
telos_repo_rows.integration_need: Keep README and changelog concise; link subregistries instead of embedding strategy, raw source payloads, or working-tree claims.

telos_repo_rows.role: current-state, architecture, roadmap, posture, connection, and inventory docs
telos_repo_rows.integration_need: Refresh after Index, Forum, Gather, Crucible, and Telos passes; separate committed, working-tree, planned, inferred, and unverifiable claims.

telos_repo_rows.role: machine and human registries for cross-repo classification
telos_repo_rows.integration_need: Use registries for routing only; do not treat registry presence as proof of correctness, publication readiness, or release status.

telos_repo_rows.role: official packets and longer paper drafts for frontier research lanes
telos_repo_rows.integration_need: Require source, scope, falsification, reproduction, risk, and freshness gates before public promotion.

telos_repo_rows.role: runnable local fixtures, tests, and source receipts
telos_repo_rows.integration_need: Pair each fixture with targeted tests and non-claims; mark QEC and other uncommitted artifacts working-tree-only until published.

telos_repo_rows.role: social, comment, and wave outreach drafts
telos_repo_rows.market_role: distribution copy after official proof exists
telos_repo_rows.integration_need: Require official packet, proof-demo command, and receipt id before outreach makes a claim.

telos_repo_rows.role: run receipts, measurements, theses, reports, Learn packets, and Crucible objects
telos_repo_rows.market_role: proof trail and reviewer handoff substrate
telos_repo_rows.integration_need: Cite hashes, reports, and typed refs in public docs; keep raw object stores out of front-door copy.

telos_repo_rows.role: CLI demos, MCP catalog, manifests, research adapters, and tests
telos_repo_rows.integration_need: Treat tested demos as evidence only for bounded contracts; keep catalog and manifest parity validated.

telos_repo_rows.role: frontier R&D scope and high-risk publication boundary
telos_repo_rows.integration_need: Shape cybernetics, biochem, nuclear, AI/ML, quant, defense-adjacent, medical, and robotics material as research, measurement, safety, simulation, assurance, education, or accountable tooling.

telos_repo_rows.role: implementation plans, specs, and verification reports
telos_repo_rows.integration_need: Rerun relevant commands before turning a spec or historical report into a current capability claim.
Keep budget and brand docs separate from scientific proof, traction, funding, or market-validation claims.

telos_repo_rows.role: caches, local Gather payloads, temporary data, and ignored source-like material
telos_repo_rows.integration_need: Reference only digest seals, redacted refs, and claim boundaries in public artifacts.

megatool_nodes.verification_layer: bounded replay and explicit safety-to-publish review

internal_fences.reason: Raw transcript bodies and source payloads should not be copied into public docs.
internal_fences.public_reference_shape: hashes, source URLs, source-lead status, and paraphrased claim boundaries only

internal_fences.reason: Never publish credentials or private session state.
Public artifacts should emphasize measurement, safety, simulation, assurance, and non-claims, not operational instructions.
internal_fences.public_reference_shape: sanitized methodology, bounded simulation, uncertainty, safety-to-publish rationale

next_actions: Keep the Telos repo, Build ecosystem, proof/witnessing, and Senses subregistries current as Build receipts, proof-surface bridge fixtures, paper gates, and proof-kit schemas land.
Add a commit-boundary publication gate before README, site, or outreach copy claims a working-tree artifact is shipped.
Build a receipt-index bridge over docs/outreach/receipts and demo/research receipts.
Add an outreach-to-official claim gate that requires each outreach wave to cite an official packet, proof-demo command, and receipt id.
Add cache/raw-payload quarantine checks for docs/research/dogfood caches and local Gather payload references.
Refresh docs/PROJECT-CONNECTION-MAP.md and docs/FORWARD-FACING-REPOSITORY-INVENTORY.md from the 2026-07-02 Index map.
Create a BuildLang-to-Crucible receipt import fixture inside Telos.
Promote the causal workbench with a synthetic SCM and BuildLang typed DAG receipt.
Promote one industrial-science lane using primary public sources, units, uncertainty, and a non-claim gate.
Keep Ti Morse and other video material as source leads until primary sources or replayed experiments exist.
